name: Apricot Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream butter and sugar.
2. Add eggs. Mix well.
3. Combine bananas and buttermilk.
4. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
5. Add to creamed mixture.
6. Stir in bran, apricots, and nuts.
7. Pour into a greased 9x5x3-inch loaf pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 55-60 minutes or until bread tests done.
9. Cool for 10 minutes before removing from pan to wire rack.
